texto: Love is patient, love is kind and is not jealous; love does not brag and is not arrogant, does not act unbecomingly; it does not seek its own, is not provoked, does not take into account a wrong suffered, does not rejoice in unrighteousness, but rejoices with the truth; bears all things, believes all things, hopes all things, endures all things. Love never fails;...
explicacao: Citação de God through Paul in Corinthians 13:4-8a sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Love is patient, love is kind and is not jealous; love does not brag and is not arrogant, does no…” articula reflexao, bible, corinthians em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e corinthians.
